prompt: Tap big blind seat before range-advantage action.
why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before range decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Big blind is the seat anchor here because the forced defender defines how wide the advantage battle can stay.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Start with the big blind so you know who defends from the forced seat and how wide that range can be. That seat anchor is what makes the later range-advantage read mean something.
